cookieConsent.bannerText: We use cookies to personalize content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyze our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners.
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off.
cookieConsent.settingsDesc: These cookies allow the website to remember your preferences and provide enhanced functionality.
cookieConsent.statisticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting anonymous information.
cookieConsent.marketingDesc: These cookies are used to display advertisements that are relevant to you and to measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.

heroBanner.title: Donate
heroBanner.subtitle: Support the Assyrian communities in Germany and in the crisis regions of the Middle East.

humanitaer.title: Humanitarian Account
humanitaer.description: Humanitarian account for Assyrians in need due to war and disasters in their home countries

zavd.title: ZAVD Donation Account
zavd.description: Support the work of ZAVD for refugees and migrants in Germany and Europe

heroBanner.title: Humanitarian Aid
heroBanner.subtitle: Humanitarian account for Assyrians in need due to war and disasters in their home countries.

left.transparencyText: ZAVD e.V. is a registered non-profit organization exempt from corporate and trade tax. Your donation is tax-deductible. Tax number: 103/111/70053
left.certificateText1: Your donation is tax-deductible. For amounts under €200, a copy of your bank statement with the donation order printout is sufficient.
left.certificateText2: To deduct donations of more than €200 for tax purposes, we will issue you a donation certificate (tax receipt) for the tax office.
left.certificateText4: 20% of annual income may be claimed as a special deduction for a donation.

middle.whyText: The Central Association of Assyrian Organizations in Germany e.V. (ZAVD) provides social and humanitarian assistance for refugees and suffering Assyrians from their home countries (Syria, Iraq, Turkey, Lebanon and Iran). Please support us with a donation in emergency situations in war zones.
middle.specialty1: The war victims are from the home regions of the Assyrians, whom we represent in Germany
middle.specialty2: We have direct contact with all home organizations and can forward donations to the appropriate well-known organizations on the ground
middle.specialty3: In disasters, such as attacks on civilians, we are notified as one of the first organizations in Germany by affected organizations and individuals in the homeland
middle.specialty4: Many Assyrians from Germany have relatives and acquaintances in their homeland. On behalf of Assyrians in Germany, it is therefore important to us that donations reach the right organizations

right.paypalText: With PayPal, you can make a quick, easy and secure donation via PayPal, credit card or debit card. Simply click the button below and follow the next steps.

heroBanner.title: ZAVD Donation Account
heroBanner.subtitle: Support the educational, integration and cultural work of ZAVD in Germany and Europe.

left.transparencyText: ZAVD e.V. is a registered non-profit organization exempt from corporate and trade tax. Your donation is tax-deductible. Tax number: 103/111/70053
left.certificateText1: Your donation is tax-deductible. For amounts under €200, a copy of your bank statement with the donation order printout is sufficient.
left.certificateText2: To deduct donations of more than €200 for tax purposes, we will issue you a donation certificate (tax receipt) for the tax office.
left.certificateText4: 20% of annual income may be claimed as a special deduction for a donation.

middle.whyText: The Central Association of Assyrian Organizations in Germany e.V. (ZAVD) promotes the social, cultural and civic integration of Assyrians in Germany and Europe. Your donation supports educational programs, refugee assistance and integration work.
middle.specialty1: We promote the integration of Assyrians and other migrants in Germany through educational and cultural programs
middle.specialty2: We offer free advice and support for refugees and migrants in legal and social matters
middle.specialty3: We connect Assyrian communities in Germany and Europe and strengthen their cultural heritage
middle.specialty4: As a non-profit association, we work transparently and efficiently — your donation goes directly to the projects

right.paypalText: With PayPal, you can make a quick, easy and secure donation via PayPal, credit card or debit card. Simply click the button below and follow the next steps.
